recommendations.title: Rosewood
recommendations.overview: Spurred by a white woman's lie, vigilantes destroy a black Florida town and slay inhabitants in 1923.

recommendations.title: Four Brothers
recommendations.overview: Four adopted brothers return to their Detroit hometown when their mother is murdered and vow to exact revenge on the killers.

recommendations.title: Higher Learning

recommendations.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious

recommendations.title: Shaft

recommendations.title: Poetic Justice
recommendations.overview: Still grieving after the murder of her boyfriend, hairdresser Justice writes poetry to deal with the pain of her loss. Unable to get to Oakland to attend a convention because of her broken-down car, Justice gets a lift with her friend, Iesha, and Ies

recommendations.title: Summer of 84
recommendations.overview: After suspecting that their police officer neighbor is a serial killer, a group of teenage friends spend their summer spying on him and gathering evidence, but as they get closer to discovering the truth, things get dangerous.
recommendations.director: Yoann-Karl Whissell, François Simard, Anouk Whissell

recommendations.title: Drishyam 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years after the case related to Vijay Salgaonkar and his family was closed, a series of unexpected events bring truth to light that threatens to change everything for the Salgaonkars. Can Vijay save his family this time?
